summary: The page reproduces all 11 sections in correct order with accurate text, EDS signature classes present, and assets correctly wired, matching the 91% pixel score. Main defects are the hero image not rendering (collapsed to a thin gradient bar in the render), some image x-position offsets in the header/cards, and minor ISI/RTF font weight/size issues.

issues.expected: Full hero image (1070x461) with patients, headline, TO-DAY LIST logo, CTA, and disclaimer overlay
issues.actual: Render shows only a thin colored gradient bar; the hero image and all overlay content collapsed (worst mismatch region 75% at y384-768)
issues.fix: Fix the hero CSS so the image renders at full height and the absolute-positioned content overlays it correctly

issues.actual: Measured 18px/400/rgb(33,37,41) in the long RTF body
issues.fix: Ensure the bold list item styles apply (15px, 700, #000000)
Adjust nav link gaps/alignment to shift icons right

issues.fix: Increase left offset/centering for the footer logo

issues.fix: Apply font-weight 700 to the intro paragraph
